Home / Services / Cedar Privacy Fences

Cedar Privacy Fences

Natural wood fencing that withstands San Antonio's humidity without warping.

Our premium cedar fences are hand-built using vertical grain boards that resist checking and splitting in South Texas' humidity cycle. We source 100% heartwood from sustainable forests, avoiding the sapwood that attracts wood-boring insects prevalent in Bexar County.

Each 6-8 foot panel is assembled with stainless steel fasteners to prevent rust stains on the wood. Posts are set 36" deep in reinforced concrete to combat soil movement in areas like Helotes where limestone shelves create unstable ground.

Optional upgrades include routed top edges to shed rainwater away from your foundation and custom stains formulated to protect against UV damage while complementing local architecture from Spanish Revival homes to modern farmhouses.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Site evaluation checking for underground utilities and soil composition
  2. 02 Step 2: Custom design consultation matching your home's architecture
  3. 03 Step 3: Permitting assistance for San Antonio's historic districts
  4. 04 Step 4: Installation with daily cleanup protocol

Benefits

  • Natural insect resistance without chemical treatments
  • Pre-stained options reduce maintenance
  • Sound dampening for busy streets
  • Adds 15-20% to property values in SA suburbs

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should I reseal my cedar fence?

In San Antonio's climate, we recommend re-staining every 3-4 years. North-facing fences last longer between treatments than those exposed to full sun on the west side.

Do you offer dog-eared pickets?

Yes, we can mill traditional dog-eared boards, though most clients prefer our shadow box design that allows breezes while maintaining privacy in humid conditions.

Can you match my existing 1920s Alamo Heights fence?

Our craftsmen specialize in replicating historic profiles using period-correct joinery techniques while adding modern structural reinforcements.

Get a Free Estimate
